allow: Bash(flutter packages pub run build_runner build:*)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('latest:', d['latest']['version']\); print\('versions:', [v['version'] for v in d['versions'][-5:]]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('archive:', d.get\('archive_url'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('latest:', d['latest']['version']\); print\('all versions:', [v['version'] for v in d['versions']]\)")
